summary: Both REQ-25 and REQ-26 appear to be substantially implemented. FloatingPhotoFrame.tsx has been rewritten to use a premium multi-layered CSS border without any SVG filigree overlay, and ShareSection.tsx now includes a WhatsApp sharing button using the wa.me URL scheme. BaseTemplate.tsx passes coupleNames and weddingDate to ShareSection. Minor concerns exist around a subtle corner gradient overlay on the photo and the reduce-motion AC, but evidence suggests these are addressed.

missing_requirements.requirement: The photo is fully visible without any element covering any portion of the image.
missing_requirements.reason: A semi-transparent corner gradient div with position absolute and inset-0 is rendered directly over the photo image. Although it uses pointer-events-none and low opacity, it is technically an element overlapping the photo area, which conflicts with the AC stating no element should cover any portion of the image.

hallucinated_features.description: WhatsApp share button is styled with WhatsApp brand green gradient (#25D366 to #128C7E) instead of the app's gold/saffron premium theme colors.
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-26 AC specifies the button should be styled consistently with the app's premium Hindu wedding theme using gold accents and matching typography. The implementation uses a WhatsApp-green gradient which diverges from the requested premium gold/saffron theme styling.
